# Consumables Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, product name, model/SKU;
- intended device/category;
- sterile/single-use status;
- size/connector;
- package quantity;
- material;
- compatibility;
- warnings/contraindications.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- IFU;
- datasheet/product sheet;
- compatibility list;
- packaging/labeling evidence when available.

## Key Characteristics

- Connector size;
- dimensions;
- material;
- sterile status;
- single-use status;
- shelf life;
- storage conditions;
- package contents.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Parent device models;
- connector standards;
- software/firmware dependencies if relevant;
- patient category;
- usage conditions.

## Common Conflicts

- Dealer catalogs overstate compatibility.
- Packaging/SKU variants differ.
- Sterility and shelf life vary by region.
- Connector compatibility is inferred without evidence.

## Review Notes

Consumable compatibility is high-risk. Do not publish compatibility without official document evidence and human review.
